title: 扩展未闭合私钥片段脱敏

sources.reason: Current sensitive-output redaction patterns only cover the generic unterminated header.
Summary verification evidence tests that assert private-key output is redacted.
Existing secret scanning and redaction fixtures.
Defines the private-key redaction remediation acceptance.

riskAssessment.reason: A missed private-key header can persist secret material in durable Summary evidence; the matcher must fail closed at end-of-input without weakening normal output redaction.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Terminated generic, RSA, and OpenSSH private-key blocks are replaced without body leakage.
Unterminated generic, RSA, and OpenSSH private-key fragments are replaced through end-of-input.
Summary verification output cannot retain private-key body fragments after redaction.

executionDecision.reason: The leak is reproducible in the current redaction function and can be fixed with a bounded header-family matcher and regression tests.

preReviewWarnings: Verify all BEGIN … PRIVATE KEY header families redact through matching footer or end-of-input, including output embedded in Summary verification evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Every BEGIN … PRIVATE KEY header family is redacted through its matching footer or end-of-input.
Generic, RSA, and OpenSSH unterminated fragments do not retain private-key body material in output.
Existing terminated private-key redaction behavior remains covered and passing.
The remediation is recorded with Summary evidence and no secret material.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Summary output redaction handles an unterminated generic PRIVATE KEY header but leaks RSA PRIVATE KEY and OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY body fragments when their END marker is missing.
constraints: Never persist private-key body material in Summary or verification output.
Keep terminated key redaction behavior unchanged.
Do not add secret fixtures containing real credentials.
intent.rationale: One header-family matcher with end-of-input fallback closes the leak consistently for all private-key formats and prevents future format-specific omissions.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested the remediation loop to continue until all listed review blockers are completed.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
